title: 2026 Golden Globes Predictions from Entertainment Editor - PureWow
text: PureWow's predictions for the 83rd Golden Globes ceremony, released January 8, 2026, feature entertainment editor Philip Mutz's complete forecast. Best Actor Drama predicts Michael B. Jordan for Sinners, calling Sinners his favorite movie of 2025 with a 97 percent Rotten Tomatoes rating. Best Actress Drama predicts Jessie Buckley for Hamnet, calling it one of the easiest categories to predict. Best Picture Comedy/Musical predicts One Battle After Another following its Critics Choice win. Best Actor Comedy/Musical predicts Timothée Chalamet for Marty Supreme. The article evaluates television categories including Best Limited Series for Adolescence and Best Drama Series for The Pitt.
